Forgot to add - quality creators DEFINITELY pay attention to which companies run bot campaigns (and pay for an insane amount of low quality RTs / QTs on posts).

They don't want to be associated with that.

Some might still work with you in the future - but will charge $$$.

加州这破天气

坐在太阳下晒得不行

Every time I come to Mountain View, I visit Computer History Museum, and each time I find something new. 
Today I found computer that was made to store only recipes because at the time marketers were wondering “why else anyone would want to have a computer at home?” 
Here it is: https://t.co/QCWBdZuZU0
